headline: Choose a class format that matches your rhythm.
description: All workshops include clay, glazing materials, firing, and guided critique.

items.title: Weekend Wheel Basics
items.description: A beginner-friendly intensive covering centering, cylinders, trimming, and finishing.

items.title: Evening Studio Series
items.description: Build confidence through repeated practice with weekly demos and personalized guidance.

items.title: Surface & Glaze Lab
items.description: Explore layering, wax resist, and texture-driven glaze tests for expressive surfaces.

items.title: Guided Open Practice
items.description: Bring your ongoing pieces and receive focused feedback on form and finishing.
